findings.evidence: `Subcomodule/Lattice.lean:23-30` lists the same main declarations as `Subcoalgebra/Lattice.lean:23-28`; `Subcomodule/Lattice.lean:42-242` follows the same theorem order/proof skeleton as `Subcoalgebra/Lattice.lean:42-239`; `Subcomodule/Lattice.lean:249-279` matches the map lemma block in `Subcoalgebra/Map.lean:158-185`.
findings.fix: Add a `## References`/source note in this file saying the lattice construction is adapted from `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Subcoalgebra.Lattice` and the image-join lemmas from `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Subcoalgebra.Map`.
findings.issue: The module doc credits the roadmap goal and Mathlib-style facts but not the existing formalization it follows: the declarations and proof order mirror `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcoalgebra/Lattice.lean`, and the map lemmas mirror `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcoalgebra/Map.lean`.

summary: The PR closely adapts existing TauCeti subcoalgebra lattice/map formalizations but gives no credit in the new file.
